since_last: 32% of 84 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.40%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 32% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.55% · BTC -0.71% · Gold -0.93% · Nasdaq100 -2.10%. 32% of 84 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.40%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.40%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -5.62%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: TER is the standout at -12.03%
cards.body: Leaders: NET +7.78%, WDAY +3.86%, INTU +3.53%, IBM +3.20%, NOW +2.82%. Laggards: TER -12.03%, INTC -11.07%, AMBA -10.91%, MRVL -9.73%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -6.02% at $150.76
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -6.02% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
